data.title: Binance Coin (BNB) Set for 360% Surge as Bitcoin Crosses $100k, Predicts Standard Chartered
data.description:
According to predictions made by Standard Chartered, Binance Coin (BNB) is poised for an impressive surge of 360% in value, particularly in light of the recent milestone achieved by Bitcoin as it crosses the significant threshold of $100,000. This anticipated increase in BNB's price is fueled by market trends and investor sentiment that often follows significant price movements in major cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin. As the cryptocurrency market continues to evolve and gain mainstream acceptance, the expectation is that BNB will experience substantial growth alongside Bitcoin's ascent, potentially leading to increased trading activity and investor interest in the Binance ecosystem.
source: https://voiceofcrypto.online/news/binance-coin-bnb-set-for-360-surge-as-bitcoin-crosses-100k-predicts-standard-chartered

data.title: Bitcoin accepted at fast-food chain Steak ’n Shake from May 16
data.description:
American fast food outlet Steak ‘n Shake has announced it will begin accepting Bitcoin as payment at all locations starting on May 16. The firm said on X on May 9 that it was making the cryptocurrency available to more than 100 million customers, adding that “the movement is just beginning,” before signing off as “Steaktoshi. ” The fast food chain initially hinted at accepting Bitcoin (BTC) in March when it posted “Should Steak ‘n Shake accept Bitcoin?” on social media.  The tweet drew the attention of the crypto community and Bitcoin proponents such as Jack Dorsey, who rapidly replied with a “yes
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/steak-n-sats-bitcoin-accepted-steak-n-shake-locations-may-16?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ether clocks ‘insane’ 20% candle post Pectra — a turning point?
data.description:
Ether surged 20% in the past 24 hours following the launch of the Pectra upgrade, with some crypto traders suggesting the growing number of ETH long positions could mark a “turning point” for the asset that has faced uncertain sentiment throughout most of 2025. At the time of publication, Ether (ETH) is trading at $2,230, up 19. 6% over the past 24 hours, according to CoinMarketCap data. Pseudonymous crypto trader Daan Crypto Trades said it was a “pretty insane candle
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ether-price-insane-candle-pectra-upgrade-turning-point-crypto-traders?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Fed Awaits Clarity Amid Rising Risks, June Rate Cut Unlikely
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the Swedish bank Nordea has highlighted that the Federal Reserve is seeking more clarity as risks increase. Both trade policy and economic outlook are considered highly uncertain, prompting the Fed to wait for clearer outcomes. The market interprets this stance as slightly hawkish, reducing the likelihood of a rate cut at the June meeting. While Nordea agrees with this market shift, it anticipates that the Fed will eventually prioritize supporting economic growth over addressing temporary inflation spikes. If long-term inflation expectations remain manageable and aligned with targets, the Fed should be able to overlook the temporary inflation impact caused by tariffs. There is also a possibility that the short-term economic impact of tariff uncertainty could exceed current expectations. However, for now, the Fed perceives limited economic impact from these measures, with some signs of progress in trade negotiations. Inflation remains above target and is expected to rise again due to tariffs.

data.title: AI decentralized apps are coming for the Web3 throne: DappRadar
data.description:
AI decentralized apps (DApps) have seen a spike in user activity and could soon challenge gaming and DeFi for the top spot in the DApp ecosystem, according to blockchain analytics platform DappRadar. Gaming and DeFi are both sitting on 21% dominance in April, judged by percentage of unique active wallets, while AI has climbed to 16%, up from the 11% recorded in the February report, data in DappRadar’s April industry report shows. “As user interest in artificial intelligence tools grows across industries, AI-powered DApps are steadily carving out their place in the decentralized ecosystem,” DappRadar analyst Sara Gherghelas said.  “If this trend continues, AI could soon challenge the traditional dominance of DeFi and Gaming, signaling a new era in the DApp landscape
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ai-decentralized-appscoming-for-web3-throne-dappradar?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound
